EVENTS

From pop-up dinners and music festivals to film productions and live theater performances, Brooklyn Army Terminal transforms every event into an experience no matter the size or occasion.

PIER CLOSURES

BAT Pier 4 parking will be closed on the following dates:

JUNE

JULY

AUGUST

SEPTEMBER

Tuesday, June 16Friday, July 3Saturday, August 1Wednesday, September 9
Wednesday, June 17Saturday, July 4Sunday, August 2Thursday, September 10
Thursday, June 18Wednesday, July 15Wednesday, August 12Friday, September 11
Friday, June 19Thursday, July 16Thursday, August 13Saturday, September 12
Saturday, June 20Friday, July 17Friday August 14Sunday, September 13
Sunday, June 21Saturday, July 18Saturday August 15 
Monday, June 22Sunday, July 19Sunday, August 16 
Wednesday, June 24Wednesday, July 29Thursday, August 20 
Thursday, June 25Thursday, July 30Friday, August 21 
Friday, June 26Friday, July 31Saturday, August 22 
Saturday, June 27 Sunday, August 23 
Sunday, June 28 Monday, August 24 

STAY INFORMED

Stay in touch with the Brooklyn Army Terminal and learn about upcoming events, news, and our tenants.

PLAN YOUR VISIT

Situated on the waterfront, BAT is easily accessible—by ferry, train, bus, and car—from Manhattan and the other boroughs, and from major highways and metro-area airports.

LEARN MORE

HOST YOUR EVENT AT BAT

Our team will work with you to find the right space for your next event at BAT.

CONTACT US

BROOKLYN ARMY TERMINAL
140 58th Street Brooklyn, NY 11220
